notes: Changed ORD-009 from Approved to In Production; KPI 'In Production' updated from 4 to 5 on dashboard refresh

Activity feed showed 'quality_hold: quality_check → quality_hold' and 'release_hold' events
Bar chart heading is 'Daily Production Output' as expected
Orders page loads with data grid table containing production orders
Grid columns: Order#, Product, Quantity, Status, Priority, Assigned To, Due Date, Created — all present and correct
Default page shows 10 rows in the data grid
Pagination info shows 'Showing 1-10 of N' format (e.g., Showing 1-10 of 16)

Page number buttons (1, 2) displayed in pagination navigation
Last page shows 6 rows (partial) with 'Showing 11-16 of 16'
Clicking Order# header sorts ascending: ORD-001, ORD-002, ... ORD-010 with ▲ indicator
Clicking Order# again sorts descending: ORD-016, ORD-015, ... ORD-007 with ▼ indicator
Due Date ascending sort shows dates in order: -, -, 3/5, 3/6, 3/12, 3/13, 3/14, 3/14, 3/15, 3/16
Priority ascending sort groups correctly: Critical, Critical, High, High, ..., Low, Low
Status ascending sort groups alphabetically: Approved, Approved, ..., Completed, Completed, ...

Filtering by Draft shows only Draft orders (1 result)
Filtering by In Production shows only In Production orders (4 results)
Filtering by Completed shows only Completed orders (6 results)
